title: Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple
tagline: Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Balasubramaniyaswamy temple (also called Vennaimalai Murugan temple) in Vennaimalai, a village in the outskirts of Karur in Karur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu,
overview.description: Balasubramaniyaswamy temple (also called Vennaimalai Murugan temple) in Vennaimalai, a village in the outskirts of Karur in Karur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Murugan. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is located in the Karur - Pugalur Road. The legend of the temple is associated with Kamadhenu taking up the duties of Hindu god of creation Brahma and creating the hill of butter named Vennaimalai. The temple has an elevated structure, a three-tiered gateway tower, the gopuram, leading to the sanctum.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

topPlaces.name: Vennaimalai
topPlaces.description: Vennaimalai is a village of Karur District located near Karur and Tiruchirappalli, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the residential area in Karur District and is known for Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple.

topPlaces.name: Inam Karur
topPlaces.description: Inam Karur is a municipality in Karur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, the town had a population of 67,131.

topPlaces.name: Pasupateeswarar Temple, Karur
topPlaces.description: Pasupateeswarar temple, Karur is located in Karur and is one of the seven Sivastalams. This city was called karuvoor during the time of Sambandar's visit to this temple.

topPlaces.name: Karur
topPlaces.description: Karur (Tamil: [kaɾuːɾ]) is a city and municipal corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Karur district and is administered by the Karur Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Amaravati River
topPlaces.description: The Amaravati River is the longest tributary of the Kaveri River in the fertile districts of Udumalpet, Dharapuram and Karur Tamil Nadu state, South India.

topPlaces.name: 2025 Karur crowd crush
topPlaces.description: On 27 September 2025, at least 41 people were killed and around 100 others were injured in a crowd crush during a political rally in Karur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The rally was hosted by Vijay, the founder and president of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK).

topPlaces.name: Manmangalam
topPlaces.description: Manmangalam is a Town and Taluk in Tamil Nadu, India, in the Manmangalam created on 12 February 2014 by chief minister Dr. J. Jayalalitha through a TV conference from Chennai headquarters taluk of Karur district.

topPlaces.name: Karur division
topPlaces.description: Karur division is a revenue division in the Karur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Vennaimalai is a village of Karur District located near Karur and Tiruchirappalli, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the residential area in Karur District and is known for Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple.
Inam Karur is a municipality in Karur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, the town had a population of 67,131.
Pasupateeswarar temple, Karur is located in Karur and is one of the seven Sivastalams. This city was called karuvoor during the time of Sambandar's visit to this temple.

Karur (Tamil: [kaɾuːɾ]) is a city and municipal corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Karur district and is administered by the Karur Municipal Corporation.
The Amaravati River is the longest tributary of the Kaveri River in the fertile districts of Udumalpet, Dharapuram and Karur Tamil Nadu state, South India.

On 27 September 2025, at least 41 people were killed and around 100 others were injured in a crowd crush during a political rally in Karur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The rally was hosted by Vijay, the founder and president of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK).

Manmangalam is a Town and Taluk in Tamil Nadu, India, in the Manmangalam created on 12 February 2014 by chief minister Dr. J. Jayalalitha through a TV conference from Chennai headquarters taluk of Karur district.
Karur division is a revenue division in the Karur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Balasubramaniyaswamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vennaimalai, Inam Karur, Pasupateeswarar Temple, Karur, Karur, Amaravati River.
